name: codex-toys-local-workspace
description: Local Codex workspace toybox operation and plugin-bundled hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a local workspace toybox with plugin-bundled hooks.
interface.longDescription: codex-toys local workspace installs skills for local toybox operation and passive Codex lifecycle hooks that write workspace hook-spool events. It does not automatically start or install a persistent service.
defaultPrompt: Check the local Codex workspace toybox.
Check workspace toybox and hook status.
